dialogos.texto_en: What do you think, Raiha-chan?
Hmm, that's difficult.\nWhen I talk to everyone and see what they choose,\neverything looks nice.
Yeah, I know.\nIt's hard to decide because everything seems so good.
Wait, are you guys talking about souvenirs?
Ah, big bro!
That's right.\nWe were discussing what to get together.
Though, we haven't really decided yet.
I see.\nWell, it IS a difficult thing to decide on.
But it's fun to think about it together like this too.
What we're talking about right now\nwill surely become a treasured memory later on.
Ah, you're right.
Hmmm...\nI wonder what would work...
When we were at the aquarium gift shop earlier,\nI thought chopsticks might be nice.
Chopsticks?\nThey had those?
Yeah, they had cute drawings of sea creatures on them.
Since we use chopsticks every day,\nit might be nice to remember the trip\nevery time we use them.
That's a good idea, but...\nit's not really a clear winner.
Ah! How about a photo album\nof pictures we took together?
...Teehee.
Huh? What's so funny?\nDid I say something strange?
No, I think that's a wonderful idea.\nAn album of everyone.
I just remembered something.
What's that?
Futaro also made us an album.\nDuring our school trip.
Oh, right. I remember now.
I guess we really do think alike since we're siblings.\nTo come up with the same idea as Futaro.
Is that so?\nI don't think I'm that similar to big bro,\ncompared to you quintuplets.
Please don't compare yourself to the quintuplets.
Anyway, you're all pretty different.\nAside from your appearance,\nyour food preferences are pretty different too, right?
That's true about food.\nAnd also, we like different things in general, but%p-2;――
But we can still talk about things we both like, right?\nIsn't that right, Futaro?
Huh? What now?\nWhat do you quintuplets all like?
Well, that would be%p-2;――
W-wait, let's focus on the souvenir discussion!
Huh?\nI wanted to talk more about what everyone likes.
That's not necessary!\nWhile we don't need to rush to decide on a souvenir,\nwe do need to decide eventually, right?
Teehee!\nAlright, it can't be helped.\nI'll stop for now.
Hmm...
Oh, I got it!\nI know what everyone likes now.
Raiha, please.\nDon't say any more.
Okay.
So, about the souvenir. We were only thinking\nabout buying something, but a different approach\nlike a photo album might be good too.
Hmm...other buying something...
Ah.
Did you think of something?
How about shells we find on the beach?
Ah! That's a great idea!\nI think that would be lovely!
By the way, they were selling seashells too.\nThe souvenir shop was selling them.
Futaro...
Huh? Why are you rolling your eyes?\nYou wanted seashells, right? They were being sold,\nso we could just pick some out there%p-2;――
That's not the point.\nYou have to pick them up yourself.
Is that so?
That's how it is.\nShells bought at a store and shells picked up\nare completely different.
Big bro, you lack delicacy\nabout these things, don't you.
(Pshh...\n So Raiha thinks I'm insensitive too...)
Come to think of it,\nthere's a beach at this park too.
Emerald Beach, right?\nIt's supposed to be really beautiful.
Wow!\nHey, hey, let's go see it,\nregardless of whether we pick up seashells or not.
Don't they have to match?
Oh, right.\nThey won't be the same if we don't get the same ones.
But if we all pick them up together,\nthe memory will be the same.\nThat's good enough as it is.
Yeah, that works.
Come to think of it,\nthere's a beach at this park too.
Emerald Beach, right?\nIt's supposed to be really beautiful.
Wow!\nHey, hey, let's go see it,\nregardless of whether we pick up seashells or not.
Not a bad idea.\nIt would definitely be a memorable souvenir.
Yeah.\nA lasting memory will be held within the shells.
Whether or not the shells are pretty doesn't matter,\nthe fact that we picked them up ourselves\nis what's important.
After Ocean Expo Park, we can go to the beach\nand if we take the time to search together,\nit could be a great memory.
Yeah, I'm sure we won't forget it.
Come to think of it,\nthere's a beach at this park too.
Emerald Beach, right?\nIt's supposed to be really beautiful.
Wow!\nHey, hey, let's go see it,\nregardless of whether we pick up seashells or not.
Yeah, I want to go too.
Alright, let's go see it, then.
